title: OSDUE Snuffle Mat for Dogs, Dog Snuffle Mat, Pet Slow Feeding Mat Encourages Natural Foraging Skills Slow Eating, Smell Training, Stress Relief, Puzzle Training Toy for Large Medium Puppies-39 * 39CM
features: 【UNIQUE AND INTERESTING DESIGN】 —— The dog foraging mat simulates the natural foraging environment of a dog, with a juicy floral design and a green plant theme. Flower shapes can be used as hiding spots for treats, making foraging games more attractive. You can hide treats and guide your dog to sniff and find them. This mat helps to relieve stress, allows your dog to use his sense of smell and burn energy, and also helps to reduce your dog's weight.

【SNUFFLE MAT FOR DOGS】—— Dogs need proper physical activity and mental stimulation to achieve a calm mental state, this Snuffle Mat for Dogs is great to help train your dog's sense of smell and keep your dog busy and happy and relieve stress.

【DURABLE AND SAFE MATERIAL】—— The dog feeding mat is made of high-quality, pet-friendly fleece for durability. This pet food mat is carefully stitched to resist tearing, fading and peeling, ensuring your dog enjoys a safe and long-lasting play experience. It's a great educational toy for dogs.

【DOG SLOW EATER】—— Does your dog have a problem with eating too fast? This dog sniffing mat simulates your dog's natural foraging environment, which can effectively slow down your pet's eating speed and prevent indigestion.

【EASY TO WASH AND STORE】—— Our dog nose pads are suitable for machine or hand washing. In addition, this large dog nose pad can be rolled up and easily put into a storage bag without taking up too much space, perfect for camping, going out, travelling with your dog.
